title: Codex review artifact routing gap
goal: Capture the missed review-artifact step from the proof-routing review and preserve the five promoted findings as evidence.
scope: Codex review workflow behavior for the proof-routing review
planning-review-pass skill routing for review-shaped requests
local-only integration opportunity for future Codex review turns
non_goals: Do not change proof-routing implementation in this artifact.
Do not make local Codex integration aids canonical workflow.
Do not add active planning items; the findings have already been promoted to GitHub issues.

review_mode.review question: Should the proof-routing review have produced a checked-in review artifact, and what local Codex aid would reduce recurrence?

review_method.commands used: agentic-workspace start --profile tiny --task "Check whether review skill routing should have produced a review artifact, and if useful create a local agent aid integrating Codex review workflow with review artifacts" --format json; Get-Content .agentic-workspace/planning/skills/planning-review-pass/SKILL.md; Get-Content .agentic-workspace/docs/agent-aids-storage.md; Get-Content .agentic-workspace/planning/reviews/README.md; Get-Content .agentic-workspace/planning/reviews/TEMPLATE.review.json; Get-Content .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml
review_method.evidence sources: skill_routing preferred planning-review-pass for the review-shaped task; planning-review-pass requires writing findings into .agentic-workspace/planning/reviews; agent-aids storage routes runtime-specific helpers to .agentic-workspace/local/integrations/<vendor-or-runtime>/; the five proof-routing findings were promoted to GitHub issues #814-#818.

findings.title: Codex review output skipped the routed review artifact lane
findings.summary: The proof-routing behavior review produced inline findings and GitHub issues but did not first write the expected planning review artifact.
findings.evidence: The startup router recommended planning-review-pass for the follow-up task, and that skill states that bounded review findings should be written into .agentic-workspace/planning/reviews using the local template.
findings.risk if unchanged: Future Codex review turns may leave only chat-local findings or issue text, losing the repo-local evidence trail used for later promotion, retention, and cleanup.
findings.suggested action: For review-shaped requests that produce durable findings, Codex should create or update a compact .review.json artifact before or alongside issue promotion.
findings.promotion target: GitHub issue if recurrence continues after the local Codex integration aid is used
findings.promotion trigger: Another Codex review turn promotes findings or reports material review findings without creating a review artifact when planning-review-pass is routed.
findings.post-remediation note shape: shrink after the Codex local integration proves sufficient or a product-level routing fix supersedes it

findings.title: A local Codex review-artifact bridge is appropriate
findings.summary: The fix is runtime-specific to this Codex session behavior, so local-only integration storage is the right first home.
findings.evidence: agent-aids-storage.md says machine-specific or runtime-specific helpers belong under .agentic-workspace/local/integrations/<vendor-or-runtime>/ and must remain optional, ignored, and non-authoritative.
findings.risk if unchanged: The workflow lesson may remain implicit and require rediscovery on the next review-shaped Codex turn.
findings.suggested action: Add a local-only Codex review-artifact bridge note that tells Codex when to invoke planning-review-pass and what closeout fields to preserve.
findings.promotion target: none now; checked-in candidate aid only after repeated value across agents or sessions
findings.promotion trigger: Promote only after repeated use shows this is repo-general rather than Codex-local behavior.
findings.post-remediation note shape: delete if unused; promote to checked-in candidate aid if repeated and portable

recommendation.promote: Five original proof-routing findings were promoted to GitHub issues #814-#818.
recommendation.defer: Do not promote the Codex-local bridge to checked-in agent aids yet; keep it local-only until repeated use proves repo-general value.
recommendation.dismiss: No additional active planning item is needed now because the issues already own implementation follow-up.

retention.trigger: After GitHub issues #814-#818 are closed or the Codex local integration has either proven useful or been deleted.
retention.proof surface: GitHub #814-#818 plus .agentic-workspace/local/integrations/codex/review-artifact-bridge/README.md for local runtime behavior.
retention.source retention rule: Store decision, confidence, source refs, and reopen/promote triggers; do not copy issue titles, current status snapshots, long command output, or source summaries unless the copied text is the judgment itself.
retention.distillation path: When decisions are promoted into issues, planning state, Memory, docs, contracts, or checks, keep this artifact as evidence/history and remove or summarize reconstructable source context at the next cleanup.

review_finding.rule: Use only these headings when a prose finding is needed; keep the canonical fields structured.

field_map.Next owner: execution_summary/follow-on routed to or required_continuation/owner surface

handoff_or_closeout.rule: Prefer structured fields; use this shape only for short human-readable summaries.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-07: Review created after maintainer noted Codex should have written a review artifact before promoting findings.
